audience: Codex, Claude, Gemini, Starlight operators, and creator/builders
firstRead: A working MCP-native research canvas where the first viewport offers New, Demo, Source, Note, Ask, active paste/drop intake, and a clear promise that sources become Codex-readable context.
references: ACOS workflow gates and trajectory memory

direction.keep: Dense local-first command workspace with visible source intake, human note capture, ask mode, typed graph state, inspector, action drawer, and MCP-safe context controls.
direction.avoid: Generic SaaS landing shell, fake metrics, decorative 3D, hidden primary actions, or destructive agent controls.
direction.signature: Nocturnal Starlight command graph where human source mapping and agent actions share the same inspectable canvas.
direction.system: Premium Web OS, React Flow, local file store, safe MCP tools, deterministic source-grounded actions.

asset_quality.why_premium: Screenshots show the real production UI and real local canvas state, not mockups or decorative filler.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.notes: Tier A real product captures from the local production preview.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.notes: Desktop and mobile screenshots inspected through Codex image viewer.

checks.name: desktop-layout
checks.notes: Composer, smart intake chips, graph, rails, toolbar, selected context, inspector, edge kind, search, setup/MCP status, export, and import controls are visible without incoherent overlap.

checks.name: mobile-layout
checks.notes: Mobile stacks composer, smart intake chips, graph, toolbar, rails, setup, and inspector without clipped primary controls.

checks.name: reduced-motion
checks.notes: Track A only; reduced-motion screenshot exists and no heavy scroll/3D path is used.

checks.name: setup-mcp-status
checks.notes: The app shows data home, MCP build, Codex config, Codex server wiring, safe paths, and copyable setup commands from a real local status route.

checks.name: agent-toolbelt
checks.notes: The Setup/MCP panel now shows the Codex MCP tool sequence, adoption report command, agent prompt, and terminal Codex handoff command; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: supported-input-contract
checks.notes: The first viewport now exposes YouTube, any video, image, web, PDF, text, and note input mappings, while the Setup/MCP card shows the matching node kinds and artifact outputs; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected from the production preview.

checks.name: human-intake-affordance
checks.notes: The first viewport now exposes New blank canvas, Source, Note, and Ask modes with Paste & Map clipboard intake, blocked/empty clipboard manual fallback, active empty-submit focus feedback, Map + Brief, note capture, file upload, detected source chips, created-node inspector selection, and an in-graph Source/Paste & Map/File/Note/Ask/Context command tray.

checks.name: clipboard-fallback-loop
checks.notes: When browser clipboard reads are blocked or empty, Paste & Map focuses the correct composer, shows a visible manual paste status, preserves drop-to-canvas intake, and clears the fallback once the human types or pastes manually; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: source-receipt-loop
checks.notes: Selected sources now expose artifact kind, ingest mode, source URL/file, chunk count, chunk preview, selected-source ask/summary/claims, and selected context copy.

checks.name: source-video-command-tray
checks.notes: Generic video links now create source_video nodes with video artifacts and attached manual notes; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots prove the command tray and mobile layout.

checks.name: codex-handoff-loop
checks.notes: The workspace command tray and Setup/MCP panel expose Codex handoff controls; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots plus API checks prove format=codex returns a ready-to-paste prompt with the context packet embedded.

checks.name: handoff-readiness-lane
checks.notes: The action drawer now exposes evidence, synthesis, scope, and Codex/MCP readiness from live canvas/setup state; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: citation-focus-loop
checks.notes: Answer citation cards and run-log citation chips now refocus the cited source node and highlighted chunk; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected from the production preview.

checks.name: guided-workflow-template
checks.notes: Guided templates now create ordered workflow nodes with a clickable workflow map, scoped selected-node context, full-canvas export path, and Codex handoff readiness; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected from the production preview.

checks.name: activation-runway
checks.notes: The Setup/MCP panel now exposes a five-step activation runway with live setup/canvas/Codex state, copyable commands, proof-canvas action, first-run/prod-preview commands, and a copyable Codex activation prompt; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected from the production preview.

checks.name: image-intake-loop
checks.notes: Image URLs now preview as typed image sources, uploaded screenshots become source_image nodes with image artifacts, and desktop/mobile/reduced-motion captures prove the source receipt, thumbnail preview, selected-source actions, and command tray.

checks.name: center-capture-and-framed-nodes
checks.notes: The empty canvas now exposes a center-stage capture textarea, and newly mapped video/source clusters are framed into view after mapping or action creation; desktop screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: import-preview-loop
checks.notes: Portable JSON imports now open a review modal with file identity, counts, node kinds, sample nodes, explicit cancel/confirm actions, fresh duplicate-id detection, non-destructive copy messaging, and source-evidence focus after confirmation; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: codex-export-preview-loop
checks.notes: Selected Codex export preview now shows scope mode, included nodes, source/chunk/edge/run/char counts, excluded/nearby nodes, scope rules, and Context/Codex actions; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: first-viewport-operator-loop
checks.notes: The first-viewport composer now exposes Capture, Map, Inspect, Ask, and Handoff as live state/action chips backed by current canvas nodes, sources, outputs, selected scope, and Codex export readiness; desktop, mobile, and reduced-motion screenshots were inspected.

checks.name: latest-intake-receipt
checks.notes: Paste, drop, and upload mapping now leaves a visible receipt with created node kinds, artifact kinds, optional action output, Codex-ready state, Inspect, Context, and Codex handoff actions scoped to the latest intake; desktop and mobile screenshots were inspected.

checks.evidence: Setup / MCP exposes install, open, capture, inspect, handoff, and Codex phases with contract/proof copy controls.
checks.name: first-success-contract

checks.evidence: Persistent composer states YouTube links, any video URL, files, or notes become Codex-readable context.
checks.name: codex-readable-intake-helper

checks.evidence: Mobile first viewport prioritizes the top composer and hides the duplicate center empty-state card to avoid blur/overlap.
checks.name: mobile-first-viewport-cleanup

verification.server: local Next preview/dev verification on 127.0.0.1:3102 and production previews on 127.0.0.1:3114/3115 during QA; stopped before handoff unless Frank explicitly asks to keep it running
verification.notes: Production screenshots inspected. Seeded Starlight Agent Canvas OS is connected, universal intake and source-grounded ask were visually verified, the canvas itself now exposes first-viewport Add Anything, Source / Note / Ask composer controls, a supported-input contract strip for YouTube, any video, image, web, PDF, text, and note mappings, a live Capture / Map / Inspect / Ask / Handoff operator loop, guided workflow templates with clickable stages, one-click Demo proof canvas loading, quick starters for Video/Web/Note/Ask, clipboard paste with blocked/empty clipboard fallback, smart detected-source chips, paste-anywhere, text drop-to-canvas, drag overlay, named upload control, video-reference mapping, double-click notes, toolbar note creation, interactive empty-state actions, selected-context scoping, selected Codex export preview with visible scope rules and exact included/excluded material, selected-source context receipts, selected-source actions, selected source copy, edge-kind selection, clickable local search evidence, clickable answer/run-log citations with highlighted source chunks, editable inspector immediately after actions, source/action auto-selection, context copy, Codex handoff copy, JSON/Markdown/context/Codex export, reviewable JSON import preview with fresh duplicate-id detection and source-evidence focus after confirmation, in-app Setup/MCP status for local home, MCP build, Codex wiring, first-success input contracts, and the five-step activation runway from install health to proof canvas, source mapping, context export, and Codex MCP wiring; mobile loads the graph below the composer before rails with a compact bottom toolbar, the first-viewport composer is bounded on mobile so it does not collide with the command tray, minimap is dark on desktop and hidden on mobile, reduced-motion media path is present.
